text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Rob Roy! What'd you get me for my
birthday, huh?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um, well... it's... I-I'm so sorry, Sweep. About your
present...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wha... D-don't tell me. You didn't get anything?
For the birthday of a great witch?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wait, that's not it. I did get you a gift... but it ran
away.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Is that a joke? What kind of excuse—wait, what?
It ran?! Wow, you found a familiar for me?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
No. Actually, it's a spell book... I happened to
find it at an antique bookstore, but I couldn't
read a word in it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It had streams of strange letters... and
illustrations of magic circles... I'm positive it must
be... a grimoire!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
For it to simply vanish... It must have run away on
its own. Ah, perhaps it's due to the magical power
it possesses!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
A book that uses its own magic? This is bad! Rob
Roy, get your stuff—we've gotta find it so I can
get my hands on it!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(Hehe... She looks so thrilled. ♪ It took ages to
come up with that writing, but it was well worth
the trouble.)
